title: Remove and install paddle shift switch + (shift up)

crossRefs.label: HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)
Cruise Control Combination Switch Removal (for vehicles equipped with cruise control)

blocks.text: Remove and install paddle shift switch + (shift up)

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.

blocks.text: 2. HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)

refs.label: HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)

blocks.text: Remove the body cover (A). Remove the garnish (B).
4. Cruise Control Combination Switch Removal (for vehicles equipped with cruise control)

refs.label: Cruise Control Combination Switch Removal (for vehicles equipped with cruise control)

blocks.text: Disconnect the paddle shift switch + (shift up) coupler from the coupler holder and disconnect the coupler. Remove the paddle shift switch + (shift up) (A).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
